text:
Hi Gael Roualland!

>>Number:         121693
>>Category:       kern
>>Synopsis:       in kernel alias_irc nat double panic

> FreeBSD jerry.priv 7.0-STABLE FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE #0: Thu Mar 13 21:12:57 CET 2008     gael@jerry:/home/cvsup/obj/home/cvsup/src/sys/JERRY  i386

>>Description:
> Loading alias_irc in a kernel with nat activated leads to a kernel crash with a  double panic a few seconds later when at least one irc connection is active to the outside (locally originated).

> Unfortunately I do not have a backtrace available, core dump was lost. I will reproduce if needed to get it.


This is looks much the same like kern/121693 on 6.3, which has backtrace
included.
